name: Miniclaw Trust
description: Agent identity and mutual authentication via Ed25519 key pairs. Enables cryptographic handshakes between AM, AR, and eventually humans.

agentId.description: This agent's identity string (e.g. am, ar)

trustDir.description: Directory for trust store (peer pubkeys, sessions)

sessionTtlMs.description: Session TTL in ms after handshake (default 3600000)
